Add Web Push notifications for true background nudges

- Server generates VAPID keys and runs push timer thread
- Push timer fires at configured popup_interval_minutes
- Only sends if there are active reminders
- PWA subscribes to push on boot (after permission granted)
- SW handles push events and shows native notifications
- Clicking notification focuses/opens the app
- Replaces client-side timer approach (killed when app closes)
- Expired subscriptions auto-cleaned
